title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!
